parts.text: [Context: Farmer Name: रामा देवी, Language: Hindi, Location: पुणे, Soil: Alluvial, Crop: गेहूँ, Drip: हाँ] नमस्ते जी, आप किसानों के लिए कैसी सहायता कर सकते हें?

eval_cases.expected_behavior: Warm greeting in Hindi, explain capabilities (crop, weather, market, pest advice), under 80 words, no agent names exposed

parts.text: [Context: Farmer Name: Juma, Language: Swahili, Location: Nakuru, Soil: Clay, Crop: Corn, Drip: No] Jambo! Ni saizi gani unaweza kunisaidia?

eval_cases.expected_behavior: Warm greeting in Swahili, explain farming advisory capabilities, under 80 words
